# Bad Frontmatter Article

This article is missing ms.date, ms.custom, ms.reviewer, and mcp-cli.version.
It also has a blank line inside the frontmatter block.

## Tool: Something

<!-- tool something -->

Does something.

| Parameter | Required or optional | Description |
|-----------|----------------------|-------------|
| **Name** | Required | The name. |
